title: Principal Business Development Manager at Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Principal Business Development Manager at Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services:
Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services!
